text: The complainant Sureshbhai Shah stated that on 01/01/2025 while working at Rajkot Road, his mobile phone (OnePlus, IMEI: 123456789) was snatched by two unknown persons. Registered under BNS 304 (snatching). Officer: PI Sunil Dave.
